changeSet.author: orbithealth
changeSet.comment: Assign seeded unassigned AST antibiotic catalog items to Bacteriology Laboratory.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.inventory_item SET department_test_section_id = 168 WHERE item_type = 'ANTIBIOTICS' AND department_test_section_id IS NULL AND COALESCE(project_name, '') = '' AND category IN ( 'Aminoglycosides', 'Penicillins', 'Macrolides', 'Monobactams', 'Cephalosporins', 'Phenicols', 'Fluoroquinolones', 'Lincosamides', 'Polymyxins', 'Lipopeptides', 'Tetracyclines', 'Phosphonic Acids' );
